channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Man killed after crashing truck into Detroit synagogue during preschool hours
item.description: A man drove his truck into the Temple Israel Synagogue in a Detroit suburb while children were at the preschool inside. The assailant was killed during a confrontation with security personnel, one of ...

item.title: India engages with Iran for safe transit of its ships through Strait of Hormuz amid Gulf tensions
item.description: The Indian government confirmed that External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar held discussions with his Iranian counterpart Seyed Araghchi on the safe passage of commercial ships through the Strait of ...

item.title: Hollywood’s changing beauty standards: When cosmetic enhancements and rapid weight loss reshape public perception
item.description: Hollywood’s long-standing beauty ideals, which emphasised looking polished, slim, and healthy, are shifting dramatically. Recent trends show a rise in both rapid weight loss through GLP-1 drugs like O...

item.title: Delhi Metro fan recognised for riding inaugural trains on all new routes
item.description: A dedicated Delhi Metro enthusiast has been felicitated for his remarkable feat of riding the first train on all the newly inaugurated corridors of the Delhi Metro network. His consistent passion for ...

item.title: US KC-135 refuelling aircraft crashes in western Iraq, no casualties from hostile fire
item.description: An American KC-135 refuelling aircraft went down in western Iraq on Thursday, while a second plane involved in the operation landed safely, the US military confirmed. The incident, reported by US Cent...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte speaks out against misuse of her minor son’s photo on social media
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte publicly condemned the unauthorized use of her minor son's photograph in a social media post that circulated false information. The post quoted her son urging people to 'ta...

item.title: Iran's Governmental Institutions and Power Dynamics Under New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei
item.description: Following the death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in U.S.-Israeli strikes in late February 2026, his son Mojtaba Khamenei was appointed as Iran's new supreme leader, prompting U.S. President Donald Trump ...

item.title: Former Egale Canada President Leaves to Advocate Against Antisemitism
item.description: Jacki Lewis, managing partner of Toronto law firm Lewis & Associates and former president of Egale Canada, has resigned from the national LGBTQ advocacy organization after more than a decade on its bo...

item.title: PM Modi Expresses Concern Over Middle East Tensions in Discussion with Iran President
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi recently held discussions with the President of Iran to deliberate on the ongoing tensions in the Middle East. During this dialogue, PM Modi expressed deep concern over th...

item.title: Ondo Governor Reacts to Court Ruling on Re-election Eligibility
item.description: Ondo State Governor, Lucky Aiyedatiwa, don yarn say di Federal High Court ruling wey dey Akure wey talk say him no fit run again as governor na too early matter and e dey distract am from him work. Di...

item.title: Authorities seize R25 million in illegal cigarettes in Polokwane warehouse, manager arrested
item.description: A major law enforcement operation in Polokwane led to the seizure of illicit cigarettes worth approximately R25 million and the arrest of a 39-year-old Indian national suspected of managing the wareho...

item.title: Indian Airlines Resume Flights to Riyadh Amid West Asia Airspace Monitoring
item.description: The Ministry of Civil Aviation (MoCA) has announced that it is closely monitoring the situation in West Asia as Indian airlines resume operations affected by recent geopolitical tensions. Starting fro...

item.title: Government sets up presidential inquiry to address October 2025 election unrest
item.description: Tanzania government is working hard to deal with the unrest from the 29 October 2025 General Elections. President Samia Suluhu Hassan established an Independent Commission of Inquiry on 18 November 20...

item.title: Court bailiff in County Durham dies following assault at workplace
item.description: Jeff Blair, a 55-year-old former police officer turned court bailiff, tragically died after being assaulted while at work in Shildon, County Durham. The incident occurred around 1pm on Tuesday, and Mr...

item.title: California Officials Confirm No Verified Threat from Iran Following FBI Memo
item.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom reassured the public that there is no imminent threat to the state after an FBI memo reported unverified claims of potential drone attacks by Iranian-affiliated actors...

item.title: Former ISIS supporter opens fire at Old Dominion University, kills one and wounds two before being subdued by ROTC students
item.description: On March 12, 2026, a tragic shooting took place at Old Dominion University in Norfolk, Virginia, inside Constant Hall, the business school building. The suspect, identified as Mohamed Bailor Jalloh, a...

item.title: Fast local trains bypass Ambattur, causing extra travel for commuters
item.description: Commuters travelling to Ambattur are facing delays due to fast local trains arriving from Arakkonam and Tirutanni towards Chennai Central, which do not have a platform on the fast line at Ambattur rai...

item.title: Parliament instructs National Treasury to dissolve nine state corporations and merge 42 others
item.description: Kenyan MPs have directed the National Treasury to implement major reforms in the public sector by dissolving nine parastatals and merging 42 others into fewer entities. This directive comes as part of...

item.title: Sydney Biennale 2026 Explores History, Culture and Political Voices Through Art
item.description: The 25th Sydney Biennale, under Emirati artistic director Hoor Al Qasimi, opens this weekend across multiple venues including the Art Gallery of NSW, White Bay Power Station, and regional galleries. D...

item.title: Iran’s New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei Outlines Priorities and Vows Revenge for Martyrs
item.description: Iran has officially announced Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei as its new Supreme Leader, following the passing of the previous leader. In his first address, broadcasted on state television, Khamenei extend...
